hero.title: Battery Storage Solutions
hero.subtitle: Maximise your solar energy utilisation with BrightPeak Energy' PV Battery Storage solutions. It makes so much sense to pair a battery with your solar panels.

contentBlocks.paragraph: The solar panels generate electricity which charges the battery. The battery then supplies power to your home.

contentBlocks.subHeading: Why is it good to have one?
contentBlocks.paragraph: Pairing a battery with your solar panels is a smart investment. You can save even more money and become even more grid independent.

items.title: Maximise Solar Utilisation
items.desc: Store excess solar energy instead of exporting it — use every kilowatt you generate

items.title: Lower Energy Bills
items.desc: Use stored solar energy in the evening when grid electricity costs are highest

items.title: Energy Independence
items.desc: Protect your home from grid outages and rising energy prices with stored power

items.title: Eco-Friendly Solution
items.desc: Fully utilise clean, renewable energy and enhance the environmental benefits of your solar system

items.title: Increased Property Value
items.desc: A battery storage system adds value to your home and demonstrates energy efficiency

items.title: Seamless Integration
items.desc: Our systems integrate perfectly with your existing solar setup for a complete energy solution

cta.title: Add Battery Storage to Your Home
cta.subtitle: Whether you already have solar panels or are starting fresh, we can design the perfect battery storage solution for your home.
